heading: Severability
label: 1608 Severability
text: If any provision of this chapter, or the application thereof, is held invalid, the validity of the remainder of this chapter and the application of such provision to other persons and circumstances shall not be affected thereby.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act” meaning , , , known as the Lobbying Disclosure Act of 1995. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 104–65109 Stat. 691section 1601 of this titleDec. 19, 1995
